mapper.insert: INSERT INTO claude_invocation_round (invocation_id, round_index, request_messages, response_content, stop_reason, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, tool_name, tool_input, tool_result, duration_ms, created_at) VALUES (#{invocationId}, #{roundIndex}, #{requestMessages}, #{responseContent}, #{stopReason}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{cacheReadInputTokens}, #{cacheCreationInputTokens}, #{toolName}, #{toolInput}, #{toolResult}, #{durationMs}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE claude_invocation_round SET tool_result = #{toolResult} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, invocation_id, round_index, request_messages, response_content, stop_reason, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, tool_name, tool_input, tool_result, duration_ms, created_at FROM claude_invocation_round WHERE invocation_id = #{invocationId} ORDER BY round_index ASC
